verses.text: Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a
“Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Ammon mite' lam nga in la, amaute mawhsakna thu gen in
Topa Pasian ahi keimah in amaute tungah ka gen thu hih bangin gen in: Ka biakinn kininsakin, Israel gam kisusia-in, Judah mite salin a pai na muh uh ciangin nuamin na lungdam se uh hi

Tua ahih manin nisuahna lam panin a hong pai mite' khutsungah note ka hong pia ding a, amaute in note' gamsungah phual hong satin hong teng ding uh hi. Note' nek ding singgahte leh note' dawn ding bawngnawite hong gaihsakmang ding uh hi
Rabbah khuapi pen kalaoh khua ka suaksak ding a, Ammon khuapi dangte zong tuukhawk ka suaksak ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu nong thei ding uh hi
“Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa Pasian ahi keimah in kong genin-ah: Note lungdamin khut bengin, kipakin na diang uh a, Israel gam na simmawhbawl uh hi

Hih bangin gamta se na hih manun note' nate hong sutgawp ding minamte' khutsungah kong pia ding hi. Note hong sumaimang ding ka hih manin a minamin ahi a, a gamin ahi zongin na dingzo nawn kei ding uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna na hong thei ding uh hi, ci-in gen in,” a hong ci hi.
Topa Pasian in kei kiangah thu hong gen a, “Moab mite in a thugenna uhah, Judah gammite pen minam dangte bangmah hi lel uh hi, ci se uh hi
Tua ahih manin Moab gam hutna-in a kiphut a kiima om khuapite leh a khuapi minthang pente ahi Bethjeshimoth, Baalmeon, leh Kiriathaim khuapite, midangte ka simsak ding hi
Ammon mite a zawhgawp mah bangin, Moab mite zong, nisuahna lam mite ka zogawpsak ding a, Moab mite pen minamin dingzo nawnlo ding uh hi
Tua bangin Moab mite gim ka pia ding a, tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu hong thei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi.
Topa Pasian in kei kiangah thu hong gen a, “Edom mite in Judah mite tungah a phulakna uh nasia lua ahih manin tua a phulakna hangun Edom mite tungah mawhna om hi

Tua ahih ciangin Edom mite gim pia-in, a mihing a ganhingin ka thahmangna ding thu tu-in kong pulak hi. Teman khuapi pana kipan Dedan khuapi dongin a gamsung khempeuh uh gamkhing ka suaksak ding a, a mite khempeuh uh gal sungah si ding uh hi

Keima mi Israel-te in Edom mite tungah phu hong laksak ding uh a, ka heh mahmahna tawh kizui-in Edom mite thuaksak ding uh hi. Keima phulakna zia Edom mite in thei ding uh hi. Topa Pasian in thu gen khin hi,” a hong ci hi.
Topa Pasian in kei kiangah thu hong gen a, “Filistia mite in galin a neih tawntung mite uh tungah phu nasia lakin hehna tawh susiagawp uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Filistia mite simin ka beimangsakna ding thu a hong genkhia ta ka hi hi. Filistia Zanglei-a a omlai mi khempeuh ka susiamang ding hi
Amaute nakpi takin gim pia-in, a kicing zah dongin amaute tungah phu ka la ding a, ka hehna a thuak ding uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu hong thei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi.
